scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.lint:sonarjs: npm --prefix backend run lint:sonarjs && npm --prefix frontend run lint:sonarjs
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run lint:sonarjs && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
